examples.title: Calculate F1 Score
examples.explanation: Computes harmonic mean of precision and recall

examples.title: ROC Curve Generation
examples.code:
1. Sort predictions by descending probability
2. For each threshold:
   a. Calculate TPR = TP/(TP+FN)
   b. Calculate FPR = FP/(FP+TN)
3. Plot (FPR, TPR) points
examples.explanation: Iterative threshold adjustment for curve points
